calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Aug-04-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on calendar today for Elder Adult Abuse OSC and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204. Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.

No appearance by Petitioner: Joann Nistas.

No appearance by Respondent: Christopher Dodenhoff.

The Court ordered the matter off calendar. The Court noted that prior to the commencement of today's proceedings that the courtroom clerk had been advised by a friend of the Petitioner that they had trouble serving the TRO on the Respondent.
